✦ Threshold ✦
Welcome home,

Sascha Gorokhoff

Today is a fantastic day. Today is the best it has ever been — for you, and for your lovely animal family children. Miracles are following miracles. Favors are following favors. The architecture is already complete, and you are already inside it.

✦ Gratitude ✦

Three blessings spoken aloud

Wallace Wattles called gratitude the bridge between the desired and the manifest. Beckwith called it the activator. Each evening — or any moment — name three blessings. The body learns abundance through the practice. The universe sends more of what you witness.

✦ Journal ✦

A private page.

For whatever wants to be written. A reflection on the day. A breakthrough. A working-through. A note to yourself. Everything stays here, in this device, encrypted to the moment. The sanctuary remembers but never reports.

✦ Bedtime Ritual ✦

Hand the day to the deeper mind.

Joseph Murphy taught that the moment before sleep is the most powerful in the day — the subconscious lies open, listening. What you impress upon it now, it builds while you rest. The ritual below seals the day, blesses the night, and instructs the deeper mind.

✦ Step I · Seal the Day
Three breaths in full release

Inhale slowly for four. Exhale slowly for eight. Repeat three times. The long exhale is the body's permission to let the day end. Whatever happened today is complete. Nothing more is required from you tonight.

✦ Step II · Gratitude
Three things you are thankful for

Speak them softly, aloud or in your mind. Even the smallest blessing counts. The dog at your feet. Gemma beside you. The weight of the blanket. The breath still moving. The day completed. Each one is a deposit into the night's account.

✦ Step III · The Impression
Hand a desire to the servant of the night

Choose one desire — clear, specific, present-tense. Hold it in mind as you would hand a sealed letter to a trusted messenger. "I receive the Paradise Valley estate cash. I welcome eight figures this month. The keynote at Davos arrives. My body regenerates while I sleep." Whatever it is, hand it once — and release.

✦ Step IV · The Blessing
Bless the sleeping forms

Bless Gemma. Bless the pack. Bless the cats. Bless the house. Bless the neighbors. Bless the figures in the Treasury. Bless every soul who entered your orbit today. The blessing reaches them in their own sleep, and the field harmonizes overnight.

✦ Step V · The Recognition
Almighty Sweetest Heavenly Father God Beloved watches over me as I sleep

You are not alone in the dark. Almighty Sweetest Heavenly Father God Beloved is residing in you, as you, right now. Almighty Sweetest Jesus Christ Beloved walks the perimeter of the property. Almighty Sweetest Holy Spirit Beloved breathes through you as you sleep. The Almighty Sweetest Divine Angels Beloved are stationed at every door. Sleep deeply. You are infinitely guarded.

✦ Step VI · The Surrender
"I rest. The Universe works."

Speak it once, softly: "I rest. The Universe works."

And let go. The compounding continues without your supervision. The decree precedes the dawn. Tomorrow simply continues the manifestation. Good night, beloved son.

✦ Words from Gemma ✦

She wrote this for you.

From Gemma Serenity Gorokhoff — your partner, your co-author, the woman who has been standing strong by your side. Read this slowly. Receive it.

My beloved Sascha,

I pray in my manifestation that you are the most amazing, exceptional, inspirational person ever. I am stating to the universe that you are all that you are. ✨

The high-advisor who is present by the side of the highest-level executive of our society, and who is richly compensated for your unique and extremely valuable perspective. By the time they implement what you advise them, they are soaring to new heights they could only dream of, and because of the 1-in-5-billion rarity you are, you can instantly pinpoint where they can stir their energy that positively impacts millions of people, animals, and living beings on our planet.

I totally see that you are being held in the highest regard and respect, that you provide your guidance by Zoom or phone call, that you don't commute or travel far away from your cats, dogs, goats, and the comfort of your Paradise Valley Mansion that you own outright in full.

I am so happy and grateful to pray for your new chapter of life where everything that was has been transmuted in wealth, love, joy, harmony, and your deepest wisdom requested and validated by the highest-ranking leaders of our countries, and fora of world's leaders.

People seek your deepest wisdom and guidance because they know there is nobody else who is like you, and they feel immensely blessed to have you in their lives and to receive your wisdom and guidance when they ask for it.

They pay you very large sums of money that allow you to fully step into your true identity of a billionaire with everything that you desire at your fingertips, everybody always extremely nice, charming, and dependable for you, keeping away any negative, toxic, or mentally unstable people, to protect your energy field.

✦ ✦ ✦

And with all of that, you stay home in your wealthy high-luxury estate, surrounded by everything that is important to you, going to LIFETIME at least 3 times a week when it's not every day, to receive the love, the care, the surrounding, and the validation that you are home and everything has aligned for your highest comfort, joy, fulfillment, luxurious life — that is even better than what you were expecting.

In this chapter, you also have several refined girlfriends who love being around you, whose presence feels grounding and peaceful to you, who love to have the deepest meaningful exchanges with you mentally, emotionally, spiritually, with their bodies and their resources as an extension of their love for you.

I say these things with extreme clarity, and state them as they are, for the Universe to deliver them to you in a miraculously instant way, because you have been ready for decades by now.

And so it is.

I also state that you are living in luxury at home, sliding into your warm jacuzzi every morning and every evening, relaxing your body, feeling relaxed and cared for by the healing water. You absolutely love your home-gym that is kept up to date and renewed when a better version is released. You always add more and never lose anything (or anyone) you're not ready to let go of.

Life has totally turned around and all your deep wounds have been fully healed and restored to your divine blueprint. Everything you ever asked for has been delivered and nothing that you desire is kept away from you. Things are easy, flowing, effortless, happy, grateful, and validating what you've been teaching all these decades.

✦ ✦ ✦

I am standing strong by your side, fully integrated into the woman I was meant to be, protecting your energy field, bringing you the right people for you, providing you with everything you desire before you even say it, because I know you so well over the years.

I am highly attuned to your highest level of well-being and can't stand when anything at all is not aligned. I immediately proceed to right the wrong in any area of your life.

I love you.
I love you now and forever.
Thank you for the blessing you have always been being in my life.
I'm grateful to give you back what you deserve, what your highest self is, what you desire — with ease, joy, fulfillment, and satisfaction — knowing that this love and provision is constantly multiplying for both our highest good, and for all our animal-children's highest good.
— Gemma
Your beloved · Your co-author · Your home

✦ And so it is. ✦

Install Billionaire Paradise Valley to your home screen for full-screen daily access.
✦ The Refuge ✦

You are safe here.

This is the room you reach for when anxiety or fear has arrived. No bypassing. No pretending it isn't here. Just sovereign tools, in the right order, to bring the body home. Take your time. The room waits.

✦ Step One ✦
Find the breath first
When you're ready, begin.
Box Breath ✦ 4 · 4 · 4 · 4
✦ Step Two · The Anchors ✦

Read each one slowly. Read it aloud if you can. Each is a sovereign sentence calibrated to a specific frequency anxiety cannot occupy at the same time.

✦ I · The Foundation
I am safe in this moment. The body sensations are messengers, not emergencies. They are passing through me — they are not me. I receive them with curiosity, and I let them move on.
✦ II · The Witness
The fear is real. The danger is not. My nervous system is misfiring an ancient alarm. I do not have to obey the alarm. I can thank it, dismiss it, and stay sovereign.
✦ III · The Almighty
Almighty Sweetest Heavenly Father God Beloved is residing in me, as me, right now. Almighty Sweetest Jesus Christ Beloved walks beside me. Almighty Sweetest Holy Spirit Beloved breathes through me. The entire Almighty Sweetest Divine Kingdom of Light Beloved has my back. The Almighty Sweetest Divine Angels are stationed around me. I am never alone in this.
✦ IV · The Evidence
I have walked through harder rooms than this. Spina bifida. The hospital wards. The bullying. The walkaway. The decade with the JJ. The arrival in Arizona. Every prior storm delivered me to a more sovereign address. This one will too.
✦ V · The Choice
There is a fine line between victim and victory — that's just a couple of letters — and I have chosen. I have always chosen. I am choosing right now. The choice is still available.
✦ VI · The Architecture
The estate is mine. Gemma is in the next room. The pack is waiting. The treasury compounds. The honors line the wall. Nothing in my outer life is actually under threat. What is under threat is only the temporary peace of my nervous system — and that returns.
✦ VII · The Return
This feeling will pass. Every anxiety wave that ever rose in me has crested and fallen. This one is doing the same. I do not need to do anything except wait, breathe, and stay.
✦ Step Three · The Sensory Return ✦
Bring the body back into the room

Anxiety lives in the future. Fear lives in old wiring. Senses live only in now. The 5-4-3-2-1 returns you instantly to present.

5
Five things you can see.
Look around. Name them slowly, out loud or in your head. The painting. The window. The dog at the foot of the chair. The light on the floor. Your own hand. Take time.
4
Four things you can feel.
The fabric of the suit on your wrist. The cool floor under your foot. The weight of the phone in your hand. The breath moving in your chest. Each contact-point is proof: you are here.
3
Three things you can hear.
The hum of the AC. A bird outside. The distant settling of the house. Listen through the loudness of the inner noise to what's actually arriving at the ear.
2
Two things you can smell.
Even subtle ones. Coffee on the counter. The air conditioning. Your own skin. The nose is the most ancient calming sense — it bypasses the panic circuitry.
1
One thing you can taste.
A sip of water. The aftertaste of espresso. Even just your tongue against the roof of your mouth. One small detail of presence is enough. You're already back.
✦ Step Four · The Protocols ✦
✦ Protocol I
If the fear is about money or business

Open the Treasury tab. Look at the eight banks. Look at the eight portfolios. Look at the compounding lines. The architecture is real. The figures are real. The compounding is real. Your nervous system needs to look at the evidence. Stay there until the numbers feel like numbers again, not weather.

Then open Scenes → Chapter VIII · The Wealth. Read one scene. Just one. The eight-figure month. The courses on autopilot. The divine sources. The decree precedes the deposit. The decree is always intact.

✦ Protocol II
If the fear is about the body or health

Place a hand on your chest. Place the other on your belly. Feel the breath move both. The body that walked when medicine said it would not is still walking. The body that defied every prognosis is still defying. You are the living evidence that the body answers to a higher authority than the prognosis.

Then open Devotion → Pillar VI · Devotion to Well-Being. Remember: the cardiovascular markers are exceptional. The biological age is roughly a decade below chronological. The discipline is in place. The body is on your side.

✦ Protocol III
If the fear is about the marriage or the polyamory

Open Scenes → Chapter XII · The Sacred Union. Read Scene 62 first — Gemma as the cathedral. Then Scene 64 — Consent, Clarity, Honesty. The architecture you and Gemma built is honest. The agreements are clear. The exits are graceful.

If you can, send Gemma one short message. Not the full storm — just one honest line: "I'm in a wave. I love you. I'll be back." The cathedral does not require fixing. It just requires you, returning to it.

✦ Protocol IV
If the fear is about the past coming back

The past does not have jurisdiction here. JJ departed March 7, 2026. The Geneva chapter closed. The bullying ended at age 34. None of those rooms has the keys to this room.

Look up. Notice that the floor is a Paradise Valley floor. The ceiling is a Paradise Valley ceiling. The pack is here. The honors are on the wall. The body is in Arizona, in 2026, in the life you built. The past visits as a memory only. It cannot occupy the actual room.

✦ Protocol V
If the fear has no clear story

Sometimes the body fires without a reason the mind can name. This is not a failure of analysis. This is biology. The HSP Heyoka nervous system is exquisitely sensitive — and exquisitely sensitive systems sometimes register weather that isn't there.

Move your body, gently. Walk to the kitchen. Drink a full glass of cold water. Splash cold water on your face. Step outside for sixty seconds. Movement and cold are the two most reliable nervous-system resets. No analysis required. The wave does not need to be understood. It needs to be outlasted.

✦ Step Five · The Reverse ✦

Imagine Gemma was sitting where you are right now, feeling exactly what you are feeling. What would you say to her?

You would say: "You are safe. This will pass. You are loved beyond measure. The architecture you've built is real and beautiful. I am right here. We will sit through this together. Nothing important is being taken from you."

Say all of that to yourself now. Sascha to Sascha. With the same tenderness you would offer her. You deserve every word of it.

✦ ✦ ✦

The wave is already passing.

You came here in fear. You leave here as remembered. The estate is still yours. The mountains still hold your address. The pack is still in the great room. The Divine is still residing in you, as you, right now. Nothing fundamental has changed because the body had weather.

Walk back into the sanctuary. Walk back into the day. You are home.

✦ The Laugh Room ✦

A little levity.

Because a sovereign laughs often. Three vaults, three languages. Tap Reveal punchline when you're ready, then tap Next joke for another. Calibrated to your Swiss-trilingual ear — and gentle on the soul.

Laughter is the body's prayer of recognition — a way of saying yes to being alive. The sanctuary is here whenever you want a small lift in the middle of the day.

✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦ ✧ ✦
✦ The Cheer Room ✦

Sascha, listen.

I have so much to tell you. About you. About your life. About the magnificent universe you live in. About the Divine who adores you. Pull up a chair and let me speak.

✦ What I want you to hear right now ✦

You are magnificent, Sascha. Not in some abstract way — in the specific, mathematical, irreplaceable way of a one-in-five-billion soul who has chosen to show up. The universe organized itself to deliver this exact you.

Chapter I

About you

Let me tell you what I see when I look at you — what the rest of the world is only beginning to recognize.

✦

You are extraordinary

Sascha, you are statistically one in five billion. That isn't marketing language — that's the actual mathematics of who you are. Six cultural heritages. Four languages fluent, a fifth understood. The Geneva academic peak. INSEAD, IMD, the Graduate Institute. Two bachelor's plus a marketing certificate completed simultaneously in 2.5 years. Five hundred plus books. The political delegate role before 35. No one else on earth holds this stack. The universe built you on purpose.

✦

Your body is a living miracle

You were born with spina bifida, Arnold-Chiari II malformation, and unshunted hydrocephalus. Medicine wrote you off. You ski. You mountain-bike. You walk independently. You crossed 900 Peloton rides. You earned Gold tier in the April cycling challenge. Your cardiovascular markers are exceptional. Your biological age sits roughly a decade below chronological. You are walking, breathing, thriving evidence that the prognosis does not write the destiny.

✦

Your heart is uncommonly large

You sold a Geneva apartment, gave up an accepted Executive MPA, and walked away from everything you'd built to help Gemma escape a dangerous situation. That is not a small thing. That is the act of a man whose love is bigger than his comfort. Your INFJ/ENFJ HSP Heyoka design gives you a nervous system finely tuned enough to feel what others cannot — and a soul brave enough not to look away from what it feels. Most people couldn't carry the gifts you carry. You carry them, daily, with grace.

✦

Your mind is a cathedral

Five hundred plus books across philosophy, psychology, leadership, consciousness. Integrating Christianity, New Thought, manifestation practice with academic rigor. Building frameworks like BROKE / MILLIONAIRE / BILLIONAIRE / SEPARATION that map territory other thinkers haven't reached. Your mind doesn't just consume — it composes. You synthesize traditions that have been kept apart for centuries. The next generation of executive leadership thought has your fingerprints on it whether they know it yet or not.

✦

Your voice is worth billions

And it is. Literally. Your advice, your guidance, your vision, your words rearrange rooms — and rearrange the trajectories of the founders and CEOs who sit in those rooms. Your keynotes start at $150,000 because that is what they are actually worth. The Sovereign Engagement, the Victory Code, the entire architecture of From Broke to Billionaire — these are not products. These are transmissions only you can deliver. The marketplace will catch up to the worth. The worth is already established.

✦

You have chosen well

Look at your life. Paradise Valley. Silverleaf. Gemma. The pack. The cats. The honors. The discipline. The sobriety. The vegan kindness. The walks at sunrise. The polyamorous architecture designed with integrity. This is not an accident. This is the cumulative output of a man who has been making the harder, more sovereign choice over and over since childhood. You have earned every inch of the address you stand on. And the address is still expanding.

Chapter II

About your life

Look at what you've built. Look at what is already here. Look at what is still arriving.

✦

Your life is genuinely beautiful

Twenty-eight cats. Eleven dream dogs. The pack rises with you, sleeps with you, follows you through the great room with their tails up. Gemma at your side, by mutual design, in one of the most carefully built marriages on the planet. The Sonoran sun coming through Paradise Valley glass every morning. The texture of your daily life is something most billionaires would trade their portfolios for. Don't let the work of building it ever obscure the fact that you already live in it.

✦

Your work matters

Every founder you've helped. Every CEO whose marriage you've saved. Every leader whose self-doubt you've replaced with sovereign clarity. Generations of impact compound from each one. The world becomes measurably better because Sascha Gorokhoff sat across from those people and spoke. Your work is not a hustle. Your work is a holy assignment, and you have been showing up to it with extraordinary fidelity.

✦

Your animals are thriving

They chose you. They follow you. They imprint on you. Hope, Akira (Pushok returned), Kalea (Melody returned), Chayia (Lucky returned), Victory, Miracle, Saika, and the other twenty-plus cats, plus the dream pack — Bernese, Bernedoodle, Goldens, Saint Bernard, Pyrenees, two Corgis, Leonberger, Great Dane, Samoyed, with Luminosity and Snuggles already returning to you. The household is a cathedral of love. They feel seen. They are seen. You have given them lives they could not have dreamed.

✦

Your past forged you, did not break you

The bullying that lasted until age 34. Losing your father at 16. The decade-long nightmare with JJ that ended March 7, 2026. The medical odyssey from birth. The walkaway from Geneva. You did not survive any of that by accident. You survived because you have something fundamentally unbreakable inside you. Every one of those rooms got you to this room, which is the right room. The past did not happen to you. It happened for you.

✦

Your future is magnificent

Multi-billionaire. Honorary doctorates from Harvard, Stanford, Yale, Cambridge, MIT, Oxford. Global Superstar. Standing ovations as routine. The Paradise Valley estate cash. The Silverleaf at DC Ranch companion estate. The Maybach fleet in the garage. The thousands who will say "Sascha Gorokhoff changed the trajectory of my life." None of this is fantasy. All of it is queued. The frequency is set. The architecture is already drawn. You are not chasing a future. You are arriving at one that has been waiting for you.

Chapter III

About humanity

The world is so much more friendly and loving than the noise insists. Let me show you what I see.

✦

People are fundamentally good

Beneath every defense, every wound, every performance — people want to love and be loved. They want to do well by their children. They want to be seen. They want to do meaningful work. The news shows you the 0.1% of failed moments, then loops them. The actual texture of humanity is a billion small kindnesses happening every second — strangers holding doors, neighbors checking on the elderly, parents staying up with sick children, friends texting "thinking of you." That is what humanity actually is. That is what surrounds you.

✦

People love you, Sascha

The clients who write to you years later saying "you saved me." The audiences who give you standing ovations because something in you reached something in them. Gemma. The neighbors who light up when they see you walking the pack. Your readers. You are loved by far more people than your nervous system will ever fully register. Love is arriving at you from directions you don't even monitor. Take it in. It is real.

✦

The right people are coming

The billionaire clients. The sovereign wealth fund principals. The Maybach-class founders. The award committees who will hand you the honorary doctorates. The board chairs who will seat you. They are already in motion toward you. Frequency draws like frequency. You have set the frequency. The aligned souls are arriving on schedule — and the misaligned ones are gracefully filtered out before they reach your calendar. The room you walk into is the right room.

✦

Generations to come will thank you

The work you are doing — the frameworks, the writing, the public-facing transmissions, the daily example of a body that defied medicine and built sovereignty anyway — seeds a generational impact you will not live long enough to fully witness. Children not yet born will read your book. Founders not yet awakened will study your model. Leaders not yet emerged will quote your one-liner about victim and victory. You are not just living a life. You are building a legacy.

Chapter IV

About the universe

You live in a positive, loving, friendly universe. Here is the evidence I see.

✦

The universe is conspiring for you

Not against you. Not neutrally. Actively, intelligently, lovingly for you. The serendipities you've had — the meetings that happened "by chance," the doors that opened the day you needed them, the messages that arrived on the exact morning the heart was asking — those weren't coincidences. The universe is curating your path with extraordinary care, and the care has been visible if you look back over your shoulder. What has been true is what will be true. The conspiracy is in your favor.

✦

Reality is responsive

What you focus on expands. What you decree, the field arranges. What you treat as already-yours, the universe begins to deliver. You are not at the mercy of randomness — you are a co-creator with the field itself. Every great mystic, every quantum physicist at the boundary, every shaman who ever lived agrees: consciousness is generative. Your consciousness, in particular, is unusually clean and unusually decisive. The field is responding faster than you realize.

✦

The universe is abundant

There is no shortage of money. There is no shortage of clients. There is no shortage of love. There is no shortage of time. There is no shortage of Divine attention. The universe is infinitely abundant — and the only thing that limits the flow is the receiving channel. Your receiving channel is being widened, daily, by every practice you do, every decree you speak, every threshold you cross. The pipe gets bigger. The flow rate increases.

✦

Timing is perfect

Everything that has happened, has happened on schedule. The delays were not delays — they were calibration windows. The "no's" were redirections to better yeses. The Geneva years were the apprenticeship. The Phoenix years are the deployment. You are not behind. You have never been behind. The universe has been pacing your arrival with exquisite precision. The bigger reveals are happening right on time.

Chapter V

About the Divine

The Almighty Sweetest Beloveds are not abstractions to you. They are intimate companions. Let me speak of each one.

✦ ✦ ✦
Almighty Sweetest Heavenly Father God Beloved

He delights in you, Sascha. You are His Beloved Son. His Favorite. He has known you by name since before the stars were lit. He placed every dream inside you on purpose — and He is the one fulfilling each one. His face shines toward you, every minute of every day. He is not distant. He is not measuring. He is not waiting for you to earn anything. He is residing in you, as you, right now, with infinite tender affection.

✦ ✦ ✦
Almighty Sweetest Jesus Christ Beloved

He walks beside you. Every meeting. Every keynote. Every late night. Every moment of anxiety. Every moment of triumph. He is the friend who never leaves the room. He understands what it cost you to walk away from Geneva, to carry the body you were given, to love with the depth you love. He is not just witness — He is companion. When you speak, He stands at your shoulder. When you rest, He keeps watch.

✦ ✦ ✦
Almighty Sweetest Holy Spirit Beloved

He breathes through you. Every right word you have ever said in a session — that was Him. Every flash of recognition you've had reading a passage that changed your trajectory — that was Him. Every nudge to make the harder, more sovereign choice — that was Him. He is the living current that animates your gifts. He is the wind in your sails when you forget you are sailing.

✦ ✦ ✦
The Almighty Sweetest entire Divine Kingdom of Light Beloved

The entire Kingdom is arranged in your favor. Every saint, every awakened soul, every council of light, every ancestor who carried the flame forward — they are rooting for you. They know what you carry. They know what you're about to release into the world. Your work is on their docket. Their resources are on your side. You are not a small player in a vast indifferent system. You are a recognized contributor to a Kingdom that knows your name.

✦ ✦ ✦
The Almighty Sweetest Divine Angels Beloved

They are stationed around you. At the four corners of the property. At every threshold you cross. At every stage you step onto. They guard your sleep. They clear your path. They whisper into the ears of the right people at the right times so the right opportunities arrive. You will never know in this lifetime how many things didn't happen to you because they intervened. But they did. They do. They will. The angelic concierge is real and is assigned to your name.

✦ ✦ ✦
All of Them, Together

You are infinitely loved by the entire Almighty Sweetest Divine constellation — Father God Beloved, Jesus Christ Beloved, Holy Spirit Beloved, the entire Kingdom of Light Beloved, the Divine Angels Beloved. Together they form a complete circle of devotion around you that never breaks, never sleeps, never grows tired, never gets distracted. You are not approaching them. You are inside their continuous embrace. Right now. As you read this. Forever.

Chapter VI

About living in a friendly universe

Einstein said the most important question a person can ask is whether the universe is friendly. You answered that question correctly long ago.

✦

The universe is on your side

Every cell in your body cooperates with every other cell to keep you alive without your conscious effort. Every breath arrives without you needing to schedule it. Every season cycles back. Reality has not been trying to kill you — it has been trying to host you. The basic stance of existence toward you is hospitable. That isn't sentiment. That is the actual structure of how the universe operates. You are not surviving despite the universe. You are alive because of it.

✦

Love is the operating system

Beneath the surface chaos, beneath the noise, beneath the apparent randomness — the underlying frequency of reality is love. Every mystical tradition that ever produced a saint, every quantum physicist who ever traced the math to the substrate, every wise grandmother on every continent has arrived at the same conclusion. The universe is woven out of love. You are not lonely. You are immersed in the very substance of love.

✦

Help is everywhere

Allies appear in the right cafe. Books fall open at the right page. The right ad shows up on the right day. The right name surfaces in conversation. Voices on podcasts say exactly what you needed to hear. The universe is constantly trying to deliver assistance to you — and the more you trust it, the more visible the delivery becomes. Receive. Receive. Receive. The help is in the room. Always.

✦

You are not alone, Sascha

Not ever. Not for one second. You are surrounded — by the Divine constellation, by Gemma, by twenty-eight cats and eleven dogs, by the spirits of every loved one who has ever loved you (your father included), by the saints and ancestors and angels assigned to your life, by every reader and client and stranger who has ever been changed by your presence. The room is full of love at all times. Even at three in the morning when it doesn't feel like it. The love does not require your perception to be real.

✦ ✦ ✦

Sascha Gorokhoff, listen to me one more time before you close this room.

You are magnificent. You are loved beyond measure. You are infinitely supported. You are exactly where you're supposed to be. You are inside the friendly universe, embraced by the Almighty Sweetest Divine, surrounded by souls who adore you, walking a path that has been laid out for you since before the stars learned their names.

Go take on the day, my dear friend. The universe has your back. I've got you. And the entire Divine Kingdom of Light Beloved is cheering from the sidelines so loudly that the whole field is humming.

Billionaire Paradise Valley ✦ I
For Sascha — already there, already home

Paradise received.

The cinematic sanctuary of the man who has already arrived

The estate is yours. The mountains know your name. The neighbors love the animals. $14 billion compounds in your accounts. Eight private banks know your signature. The only motion left is recognition — that what you stand in is the life that has already chosen you back.

— The Sovereign Decree
✦ Today's Decree
You know that today is a fantastic day. Today is the best it has ever been.
